Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Desolate Wilds]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — The Desolate Wilds is a location mentioned in reports.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 5''' — The Wilds is a region where sacred artists construct structures.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 6''' — The Desolate Wilds were lawless and plagued by beasts nearly a thousand years ago.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 7''' — The Wilds is a place where Jai Long was banished.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 7''' — The Desolate Wilds contains only one Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 7''' — The Desolate Wilds is a stretch of blighted wilderness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 10''' — The Desolate Wilds are described as the back-end of nowhere.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 14''' — The Desolate Wilds is a location where sacred artists reside.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — The Desolate Wilds contain dreadbeasts with rotting leaves.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 17''' — The Desolate Wilds is a harsh area containing the Sandviper sect.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 20''' — The Desolate Wilds is a location Yerin is concerned about being alone in.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — The Desolate Wilds is a region where water madra is common.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 2''' — The Wilds is a location where the Sandvipers have been for months.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 4''' — The Sandvipers specialize in hunting the beasts of the Desolate Wilds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 6''' — There is a legend of a hidden valley in the mountains to the west of the Desolate Wilds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 6''' — The Desolate Wilds is a location.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 7''' — The group departed from the Desolate Wilds a month ago.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 8''' — The Emperor holds the title to the Desolate Wilds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 9''' — The resources for Lindon's Bloodforged Iron body came from a cave in the Desolate Wilds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 12''' — The Desolate Wilds lie to the west.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 16''' — The Desolate Wilds is a location from which Jai Chen was taken.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — Sandvipers from the Desolate Wilds crawl in packs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon and Yerin went into the Desolate Wilds.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 7''' — The Desolate Wilds is a location inhabited by dreadbeasts.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — The poison in the garden reminded Lindon of the Desolate Wilds.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Eithan picked up a present from the Desolate Wilds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Desolate Wilds is a location Lindon mentions.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — The Desolate Wilds is represented by a blackened forest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — The Desolate Wilds is a location where Jai Long has contacts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — The Desolate Wilds are considered too weak to interest the Wandering Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — The Desolate Wilds have leaves tinged black with corruption.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — Jai Chen and her followers had a plan for the Wilds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — The Desolate Wilds is a location where Sages are considered legends.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — The Desolate Wilds are corrupted lands containing a few livable pockets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — The Desolate Wilds contains twisted green-and-black trees.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — The Desolate Wilds contain rolling hills and blighted forests.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — The Desolate Wilds is a location containing the Transcendent Ruins.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 5''' — People from the Desolate Wilds are in Sacred Valley.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
